DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT ANDRA ALEXANDER'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO CONTACT COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER TO SCHEDULE THE DEPOSITION. THE DEPOSITION SHALL BE COMPLETED ON OR BEFORE MARCH 9, 2007. THE REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP SECTION 2023.040. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT JAMES LANE AND ALICE LANE'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Discovery Order [Ccp 2023.010(D), 2023.010(G), And 2023.030(D)(3)]
Off Calendar Mar-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John C. Won, Esq. for defendant and moving party James Lane and Alice Lane

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant James Lane and Alice Lane's motion for terminating sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition And Written Response To Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Feb-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Andra Alexander's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents and attendance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendant within 15 days of notice of this order to schedule the deposition. The deposition shall be completed on or before March 9, 2007. The request for monetary sanctions is denied for failure to comply with CCP Section 2023.040. (BEC/610) COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
